text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I finally did it! A new record time for meee!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're three days into our summer camp. Every day, El and I train for
hours under the hot rays of the sun.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't underestimate an Umamusume from the scorching sands!
Burning heat, searing winds—blazin' sands! I've conquered them all!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, now to run from one side of the beach to the other!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El's progress since coming to this summer camp has been
extraordinary, to say the least. I have to make sure I match her
enthusiasm—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, are you even listenin'?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! This again?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're just thinkin' about training again, aren'tcha? You totally
zoned out when I talked about the festival yesterday, too...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: You've been all work-only mode this camp, ignorin' me left and right!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're almost at three strikes! Next time you ignore me, I'll
become a storm of anger, a raging wind—an erupting volcano! So be
careful, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Then we're good! Anyways, like I was saying...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I'm done preparin' for tonight's "El's Hotter-than-the-Sun Infernal
Training from Beyond!" Make sure you wear something easy to move
in!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yup, it's a super intensive two-person training session just for you and
me!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I've made preparations so that you can train along with me! I even got
a tire just for you!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Wait, you aren't gonna say you forgot about this plan, are you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I know you're not the type of person to say, "Did I agree to that," or, "I never heard about this," right before we do something, riiight?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Man, I'm gettin' hyped for tonight!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and since we're the dynamic duo, it's natural for us to at least
sync up our breathing.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
First, we'll run the beach and swim the ocean... then we'll climb the
hills and slide down through the forest...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, we're gonna do some hardcore training fit for a summer camp! I
won't go easy on either of us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Looks like I have no choice but to go along with El's plan.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Her wings glimmer in the dead of night! Blessed by the heavens, it's
none other than El Condor Pasaaaaa!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, it's time for our infernal training! Trainer, can I get your
thoughts before the match?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Looks like you're pumped! I'm excited to see how far that spirit
of yours takes you tonight!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: And here we aaaaare!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Si! It's a bright and fun summer festival!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Here, we'll do some training to help you replenish both your body
and mind!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Recently, all you do is work, work, and work some more. Whether
we're on break or in the middle of meal time—you never stop looking
at your papers!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You sleep late, but get up early! I bet you're totally sleep-deprived,
aren't you?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So today, feel free to just enjoy yourself and have fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Mhm, I smell something spicy over there! It's tacos, no doubt about it!
Hurry, quickly—let's sprint! I'll go buy us some!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We don't have even a second to waste! We're gonna enjoy this
festival as much, as fully, and as awesomely as we possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa grabs me by the hand and takes me around several
food stalls...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Munch, munch... Ah, Twainer. Wanna twy golish soopin neth?
choice_data_list: Finish eating before you talk, okay?
Finish eating before you talk, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gulp... Haha, now that's the Trainer I know.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Keep the good vibes going! Just go with the flow and have some fun!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Act natural, don't think too hard—just be yourself! Otherwise, the
future me will be in a pinch.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Yup. Listen up, okay? As you know, I will one day carve my name in
the annals of history.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And just like my pro-wrestler papa, I'll win a bunch of races! I can
already hear the cheers, the never-ending applause! I can see the two
of us standing tall!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
That's when I'll point my finger at you and say, "Applause for my
trainer, who made me into a champion."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe. I stole that line from Papa.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's why I need you to stay healthy—for future me, and future you.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Because the two of us will become the world's strongest duo.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: ...Think you can promise me that?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Bueno! A passionate promise! I'm glad I brought you to this festival
today!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Now, why don't we start our infernal festival training?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! The tacos, takoyaki, and yakisoba from earlier were just to
prepare us for the training yet to come!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This festival's just gettin' started! While we're here, we're gonna
conquer every last one of these food stalls!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, with El by my side, I enjoy a rare break at the summer festival.
